title: Maireana ovata
taxonomy: Maireana ovata is classified within the plant family Amaranthaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis. It is a part of the genus Maireana, which is endemic to Australia. The species Maireana ovata is also known as blue bush, reflecting its distinctive blue-green foliage. Further classification includes its order Caryophyllales.
uses: Maireana ovata, a shrub native to Australia, has been traditionally used in Indigenous Australian medicine.
